fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKWebpEncoderFrame` combines the image data for one frame with its display
duration. Pass a span of frames to
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated*> to encode an animated WebP.

## Examples

```csharp
var frames = new[]
{
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(bitmap1, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)),
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(bitmap2, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)),
};
using var data = SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated(frames, SKWebpEncoderOptions.Default);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Represents a single frame in an animated WebP sequence.

params.bitmap: The bitmap providing the frame's pixel data.
params.duration: The duration for which this frame is displayed.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> struct from a bitmap.

params.duration: The duration for which this frame is displayed.
params.image: The image providing the frame's pixel data.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> struct from an image.

params.pixmap: The pixmap providing the frame's pixel data.
params.duration: The duration for which this frame is displayed.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> struct from a pixmap.
Gets or sets the duration for which this frame is displayed.
fields.value: A <see cref="T:System.TimeSpan" /> representing the display duration of the frame.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the pixel data for this frame.
fields.value: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap" /> containing the frame's pixel data.
